name: Electrical Panel / Push-Button Lockout Cover
shortDescription: Transparent cover that locks over panel switches and push-buttons without hiding their state.
longDescription: A clear, special-grade transparent cover that locks over a panel-mounted switch, rotary handle or push-button, blocking operation while still letting technicians see the switch's on/off position through the cover. Round and square versions are available in small and large sizes, with cut-outs to accommodate handles that rotate 45° or 90°.

images.alt: Electrical Panel / Push-Button Lockout Cover supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
